title: Bare Bones X Reinforced Chests
description: Add barebones support for the reinforced chests mod
body:
ABOUT:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Adds Barebones support for the [Reinforced Chest](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-chests) mod in the Barebones style. _Enjoy_!
















































![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17169865680ff9777bab3412a5bba08c21b1efd1.png)
